$comment: OPC project defaults. Env vars override server settings (HOST, PORT, AUTH_TOKEN); agent entries override 'defaults' per agent. 'worker-*' matches all dynamically spawned workers.

defaults.$comment_workspaceAccess: 'run' (default): every agent can read/write the whole project-run workspace via --add-dir; 'own': agent is confined to its own folder

manager.$comment: planning quality matters most — use the strongest model; Task lets the session trigger its .claude/agents custom agent

qa.$comment: reviews only need Read + report editing

researcher.$comment: standing expert task-taker — gets web tools on top of the file tools for real research

report.$comment: consolidates logger + qa + audit outputs; server renders REPORT.html from its JSON

finance.$comment: token accountant — writes FINANCE.md from the server's deterministic tally

worker-*.$comment: dynamic workers inherit defaults; set permissionMode to acceptEdits to skip edit confirmations inside their workspace
